name: file-search
description: Search for files by name pattern or content regex across a directory tree
parameterSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string","description":"Root directory to search"},"pattern":{"type":"string","description":"File name glob pattern"},"content":{"type":"string","description":"Content regex to match inside files"},"maxDepth":{"type":"integer","default":10}},"required":["path"]}
